metadata.description: unifable — a dual-host (Claude Code + Codex) harness that makes Opus behave like Fable: completion, evidence, and verification enforced as procedure. Fork of fivetaku/fablize.

plugins.name: unifable
plugins.description: A harness that makes Opus (or any Claude/Codex model) behave like Fable: completion, evidence, and verification enforced as procedure, auto-routed per task. Native plugin on Claude Code and Codex (hooks self-contained). Fork of fivetaku/fablize, fixing the PostToolUse false-positive failure gate.
